Appearances:
Plaintiff Sutro Property Management, a California Corp.is present. Represented by Rob Ajand.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Greg Dundis is present.
Attorney Nate Bigger representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May-7-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
